$schema_note: Hard-FAIL ID collocations for lint-voice.js. Owner nit → append here → never ships again. Patterns are JS RegExp source (case-insensitive). Use negative lookahead so correct forms still pass.

rules.fix: tiap gajian / setiap gajian (momen potong/transfer). 'gaji' OK hanya untuk nominal/slip (gaji Rp6jt, 10% gaji, sisa gaji).
rules.example_bad: LO KIRIM RP1JT KE ORTU TIAP GAJI
rules.example_good: LO KIRIM RP1JT KE ORTU TIAP GAJIAN

rules.owner: 2026-07-16 — AI slop closing: WAKTU KURANG → WAKTU BERKURANG
rules.fix: waktu berkurang (proses/hasil). 'waktu kurang' kedengeran AI staccato.
